"[4] The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS injured. "
"[3] COPY WHAT IS THE DESCRIPTION OFTHE VEH"

"[1] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 04:20AM UTC, ANGEL GARCIA requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2749 (N), Longitude -118.1631 (W).NowThe user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency. This request is for SOMEONE ELSE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available.NowResponders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1012 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 31-60%. Their verified phone number is +17145150625.Now(714) 515-0625"
